ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot playfully mimicking a zebra's movement.  The animation will focus on the robot's arms moving in a way that suggests the zebra's striped pattern and gait. We'll use a combination of joint rotations and wrist movements to create a dynamic, yet playful, sequence. The sequence will start with the arms at the sides, then move into a 'galloping' motion, and finally return to a relaxed pose.  The left and right arms will move in a coordinated, slightly offset manner to simulate the zebra's legs.

frames.beat: arms hang still, ready to gallop
left arm swings forward, right arm back, a playful trot
right arm swings forward, left arm back, continuing the stride
both arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
